男主穿越二周目，一周目胎生，后面被规则了才开启的二周目，可放心吃，后宫感情文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752318141,"group_id":"7383298203921157145","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6ROCOWIvLHewC4jJaVTtCM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5fa10248256e444b98315abb9f53b719~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618903&x-signature=9tN5tTKPDUp9JjRqMsG%2BXbaOaX4%3D","user_id":"111549960936","user_name":"莫灵枫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111549960936","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7383298203921157145","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来，江诚发现自己居然穿书成了反派！
身为江城四大家族之一江家的独子，并且熟知剧情走向的他深知主角光环的可怕，当即决定离主角和女主远远的。
反派？不存在的，谁爱当谁当！
冰山总裁，青梅警花，平民校花，京都小姐……关我什么事？！
江诚的目标是星辰大海，诗和远方！
可渐渐地，江诚发现有些不对劲，女主看他的眼神怎么如此暧昧…？
冰山女总裁：“江诚，你的嘴好甜，我要尝尝！”
青梅警花：“为什么来会所，难道我的身材不好吗？”
平民校花：“诚哥哥，该起床吃早饭了哦~”
京都小姐：“江诚是我的人，你算什么东西？！”
……
江诚：“……？？”
等等！那才是主角啊，你们都围着我干嘛！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b6d1ba75258da119643d672369dddcee","author":"漫笔随枫","author_id":"","book_id":"7383298203921157145","book_name":"反派：女主硬上弓，我插翅难飞！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7383300430178026046","read_count":"29660","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"683228"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"335","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,多女主,反派,穿书,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b9f3d54aee43c0ebf02523f97af3f82b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283449&x-signature=C8JF2TuStavb%2FcgWES%2FGawcty9Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"931981806810685","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"371"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321212409342177E3072ECC19F430"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"liste
